focus_area: FSRS scoring shipped: PR #48 squash-merged as 8906ba3 (2026-04-24T00:34Z). Closes the SRS loop opened by issue #38: 4 rating buttons (Again/Hard/Good/Easy) on /review trigger a server action that runs the FSRS-5 algorithm + persists state atomically via fn_review_card SQL function. Three-layer concurrency mitigation: client pendingRating guard + server idempotency_key + optimistic concurrency (WHERE fsrs_state = p_prev_state). New runtime dep ts-fsrs@5.0.0 (pinned exact, council requires bump review) wrapped in @llmwiki/lib-srs. New Tier E rate limiter (30 ratings/user/min, fail-open on outage). Council verdict: r2 plan AND r3 impl both PROCEED 10/10/10/10/10/10 — first PR this codebase to land back-to-back perfect-tens rounds. Pipeline now end-to-end: PDF upload → ingest → flashcards → review → rate → schedule → repeat. Next session's highest-leverage target: deploy-readiness work (apply the new migrations on production Supabase + validate end-to-end with a real PDF) OR #39 (semantic chunking, the v1 unlock for downstream handlers).
last_council: 2026-04-24T00:22:48+00:00 (PR #48 r3 impl-diff PROCEED 10/10/10/10/10/10 — second perfect-tens round; all 11 non-negotiables were confirmations of shipped behavior, no hallucinations).
